ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
ayahs.translation: Have you not considered, [O Muḥammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka bi-as-habialfeel

ayahs.translation: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
And He sent against them birds in flocks,
Striking them with stones of hard clay,
And He made them like eaten straw.
